children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the term “short-term obligation” means any bond, debenture, note, certificate, or other evidence of indebtedness which has a fixed maturity date not more than 1 year from the date of issue.

children.heading: Exceptions for tax-exempt obligations
children.label: B Exceptions for tax-exempt obligations
children.text: The term “short-term obligation” shall not include any tax-exempt obligation (as defined in section 1275(a)(3)).

children.label: A
children.text: the stated redemption price at maturity (as defined in section 1273), over

children.label: B
children.text: the taxpayer’s basis for the obligation.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of such discount, divided by

children.label: B
children.text: the number of days after the day on which the taxpayer acquired the obligation and up to (and including) the day of its maturity.

children.heading: Election of accrual on basis of constant interest rate (in lieu of ratable accrual)
children.label: 2 Election of accrual on basis of constant interest rate (in lieu of ratable accrual)
i
children.text: the taxpayer’s yield to maturity based on the taxpayer’s cost of acquiring the obligation, and

children.heading: Election irrevocable
children.label: B Election irrevocable
children.text: An election under subparagraph (A), once made with respect to any obligation, shall be irrevocable.

children.heading: Special rules for nongovernmental obligations
children.label: c Special rules for nongovernmental obligations
A
children.text: sections 1281 and 1282 shall be applied by taking into account original issue discount in lieu of acquisition discount, and

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate adjustments shall be made in the application of subsection (b) of this section.

children.heading: Election to have paragraph (1) not apply
children.label: 2 Election to have paragraph (1) not apply

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A taxpayer may make an election under this paragraph to have paragraph (1) not apply to all obligations acquired by the taxpayer on or after the first day of the first taxable year to which such election applies.

children.heading: Period to which election applies
children.label: B Period to which election applies
children.text: An election under this paragraph shall apply to the taxable year for which it is made and for all subsequent taxable years, unless the taxpayer secures the consent of the Secretary to the revocation of such election.

children.heading: Basis adjustments
children.label: 1 Basis adjustments
children.text: The basis of any short-term obligation in the hands of the holder thereof shall be increased by the amount included in his gross income pursuant to section 1281.

children.heading: Double inclusion in income not required
children.label: 2 Double inclusion in income not required
children.text: Section 1281 shall not require the inclusion of any amount previously includible in gross income.

children.heading: Coordination with other provisions
children.label: 3 Coordination with other provisions
children.text: Section 454(b) and paragraphs (3) and (4) of section 1271(a) shall not apply to any short-term obligation to which section 1281 applies.
